intent: Verification pass (Round 2): Confirm all 8 prior findings (B1, H1-H3, M1-M4) from Round 1 are addressed in commit 09160053, and no new findings were introduced.

B1_click_propagation.evidence: handleClick uses both e.stopPropagation() and e.preventDefault()

H1_restorePath_persist.evidence: persistWithRetry awaited; pendingDeletes only cleared in .then() success path; .catch() keeps entry and shows retry toast

H2_focus_ring.evidence: All ring classes use focus-visible: prefix (lines 126, 143, 178, 199)

H3_card_focus_within.evidence: No focus-within classes remain in LearningPaths.tsx

M1_textarea_enter.evidence: handleTextareaKeyDown uses Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to save; plain Enter inserts newline

M4_tab_order.evidence: Link wrapper has tabIndex={-1}; InlineEditableField has tabIndex=0 for direct keyboard access

applied_fixes.finding: Test failure: restorePath test didn't await async persist before asserting pendingDeletes cleared
applied_fixes.fix: Added vi.waitFor() assertion to wait for the async persistWithRetry().then() callback to clear pendingDeletes

coverage.failed_reviewers: none (focused verification pass - manual review by orchestrator)
